title: AppArmor: runtime check if it's enabled on the host
body:
Check at runtime if AppArmor is enabled on the host.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>

comments.body:
> LGTM assuming happy tests

Finger's crossed. I remember the great battles with Travis around AppArmor :laughing:
I like this solution better than just making the tests conditional. LGTM
One last time ... stuck on `Provisioning host...`

So travis is green... Going to try and merge
@rh-atomic-bot r+
